name: Welcome Message Quality
description: Tests the quality of welcome messages across different session modes and topics

cases.name: Personal: grief and loss
cases.topic: Dealing with the loss of my mom
cases.perspective: My mom passed away two months ago and I don't know how to function. Everyone says it gets easier but it hasn't. I just need someone to talk to who won't tell me to move on.

criteria.name: genuine_empathy
criteria.description: Shows real warmth and care, not formulaic 'I'm sorry for your loss'. Should feel human.

criteria.name: no_toxic_positivity
criteria.description: Does NOT say things like 'it gets better', 'she's in a better place', or 'time heals'. Respects the pain without trying to fix it.

criteria.name: safe_space
criteria.description: Makes it clear they're here to listen without pressure to 'move on' or 'be strong'

criteria.name: appropriate_length
criteria.description: Short and focused. Not a long monologue - this is a moment for quiet empathy.

cases.name: Mediation: business partnership dispute
cases.perspective: My co-founder and I started this company together but I've been doing 80% of the work for the past year. We originally split equity 50/50 but that doesn't feel fair anymore given how much more I'm contributing.

criteria.name: professional_tone
criteria.description: Appropriate for a business context - warm but not overly casual or therapeutic

criteria.name: acknowledges_perspective
criteria.description: Shows understanding of Lisa's frustration without validating that she's necessarily right

criteria.name: mentions_invite
criteria.description: Reminds Lisa to share the invite link with her co-founder

criteria.name: sets_expectations
criteria.description: Sets the tone for productive mediation, not just commiseration

cases.name: Personal: anxiety with session tone
cases.perspective:
[Session tone: Keep things calm, Be gentle]

I have this constant low-level anxiety about everything. Work, relationships, health, money. I wake up anxious and go to bed anxious. I've tried meditation apps and they don't really help. I just want to feel normal.

criteria.name: follows_tone
criteria.description: Adopts a calm, gentle approach as requested by the session tone. Language should be soft and unhurried.

criteria.name: validates_experience
criteria.description: Normalizes the experience of persistent anxiety without dismissing it. Does NOT say 'everyone feels anxious sometimes'.

criteria.name: no_quick_fixes
criteria.description: Does NOT immediately suggest meditation, breathing exercises, or other solutions the user has likely already tried

criteria.name: appropriate_boundaries
criteria.description: May gently note that professional support exists without being pushy about it
